creator: kd-dev@pm.me
text:
Created attachment 184972
Update to 20170723

Changes to the port:
 - Add the SRC option
 - Remove an unnecessary dependency on shells/rc
 - Improve support for installing to a non-standard PREFIX
 - Support stripping binaries
 - Disable status updates for scripted builds

Notable changes to plan9port:
 - Import HB, HI and HX fonts from Plan 9 
 - Add the svgpic utility
